bead.title: migrate cli/internal/agent/* + cmd/install.go to git.Command (Phase 2a)
bead.description:
Migrate the highest-blast-radius git callsites to git.Command from internal/git (ddx-aa8a5fb3 wrapper).

Scope (~50 callsites):
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead*.go — worktree add/remove, update-ref, add, commit, fetch operations (most damaging if env-contaminated)
- cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go — worktree add/remove/prune; replace internal cleanGitEnv() with calls to git.CleanEnv()
- cli/cmd/install.go:commitPluginChanges — git add/diff/commit (this is the path that committed Bug B's bad symlinks)

For non-git child processes spawned in worktrees (executor.go, claude_stream.go), set cmd.Env = git.CleanEnv() so harness binaries don't inherit GIT_DIR either.

Replace at each callsite:
- Before: exec.Command("git", args...) with cmd.Dir = X
- After:  git.Command(ctx, X, args...)

Delete cleanGitEnv() helper in compare_adapter.go after migration.
bead.acceptance: Regression test: simulate hook env (GIT_DIR=fake bare repo, GIT_WORK_TREE=fake) and run an end-to-end execute-bead path (with no-op harness reaching WorktreeAdd, SynthesizeCommit, CommitTracker, landing/preserve refs); assert fake bare .git/config is byte-identical after. No remaining bare exec.Command("git"...) in cli/internal/agent/. cleanGitEnv removed from compare_adapter.go.
